---------------------
from FullScreenChart.modern.js
somechart = window.globalThis.localStorage.getItem('yahoo-finance-chart')

looks like the value at the end of the URL is stored in:
window.location.hash

chart can kind of be interacted with through:
window.YFinChartSDK.PERIODICITIES


function Ue(e, t, a, s) {
        s = encodeURIComponent(s),
        t = encodeURIComponent(t),
        a = encodeURIComponent(a),
        window.open(
          function (e, t, a, s) {
            const r = s ? ` chart: ${ s } ` : ' ';
            switch (e) {
              case 'tumblr':
                return `https://www.tumblr.com/widgets/share/tool?posttype=photo&content=${ s }&url=${ t }&clickthroughUrl=${ t }`;
              case 'twitter':
                return `https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=%24${ a + r }Interactive Chart:&url=${ t }&via=YahooFinance`;
              case 'facebook':
                return `https://www.facebook.com/dialog/share?app_id=458584288257241&display=popup&hashtag=%23YahooFinance&href=${ t }&quote=${ r }`;
              case 'stocktwits':
                return `https://stocktwits.com/widgets/share?body=$${ a + r }Interactive Chart: ${ t }`
            }
          }(e, t, a, s),
          '_blank',
          'status=no,menubar=no,location=no,scrollbars=no,width=500,height=600'
        )
      }
